references.english: inscribe them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.

references.hebrew: וּמִנְחָתָ֣ם וְנִסְכֵּהֶ֡ם לַ֠פָּרִ֠ים לָאֵילִ֧ם וְלַכְּבָשִׂ֛ים בְּמִסְפָּרָ֖ם כְּמִשְׁפָּטָֽם׃
references.english: the grain offerings and libations for the bulls, rams, and lambs, in the quantities prescribed;

references.hebrew: וּשְׂעִ֥יר חַטָּ֖את אֶחָ֑ד מִלְּבַד֙ עֹלַ֣ת הַתָּמִ֔יד מִנְחָתָ֖הּ וּנְסָכֶֽיהָ׃ {ס}
references.english: and one goat for a purgation offering—in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and libations.

references.hebrew: וּשְׂעִיר־עִזִּ֥ים אֶחָ֖ד חַטָּ֑את מִלְּבַד֙ עֹלַ֣ת הַתָּמִ֔יד וּמִנְחָתָ֖הּ וְנִסְכֵּיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
references.english: and one goat for a purgation offering—in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and libations.

references.hebrew: אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָשִׂ֖יא יֶֽחֱטָ֑א וְעָשָׂ֡ה אַחַ֣ת מִכׇּל־מִצְוֺת֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהָ֜יו אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂ֛ינָה בִּשְׁגָגָ֖ה וְאָשֵֽׁם׃
references.english: In case it is a chieftain who incurs guilt by doing unwittingly any of the things that by the commandment of the E<small>TERNAL</small> his God ought not to be done, and he realizes his guilt—

references.hebrew: דַּבֵּ֞ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ לֵאמֹר֒ נֶ֗פֶשׁ כִּֽי־תֶחֱטָ֤א בִשְׁגָגָה֙ מִכֹּל֙ מִצְוֺ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר לֹ֣א תֵעָשֶׂ֑ינָה וְעָשָׂ֕ה מֵאַחַ֖ת מֵהֵֽנָּה׃
references.english:
Speak to the Israelite people thus:
When a person unwittingly incurs guilt in regard to any of GOD’s commandments about things not to be done, and does one of them—

references.hebrew: אֲנִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ וְאֵ֣ין ע֔וֹד זוּלָתִ֖י אֵ֣ין אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲאַזֶּרְךָ֖ וְלֹ֥א יְדַעְתָּֽנִי׃
references.english:
I am GOD and there is none else;
Beside Me, there is no god.
I engird you, though you have not known Me,
